win_condition: Game ends when a player places their 6th star. All players then calculate final scores; highest total wins.
tiebreaker: Player controlling the most territories wins ties. If still tied, most resources (coins excluded) wins.

categories.label: Coins in Hand
categories.description: Each coin in hand is worth 1 point.

categories.label: Stars Placed
categories.description: Value per star depends on popularity tier: 3/4/5 points each.

categories.label: Territories Controlled
categories.description: Value per territory depends on popularity tier: 2/3/4 points each.

categories.label: Resource Pairs
categories.description: Value per 2 resources depends on popularity tier: 1/2/3 points per pair.

categories.label: Structure Bonus
categories.description: Bonus points from the structure bonus tile based on structure placement.
